folio.label: 203r
folio.l: He hatú take on hi~ , many a gret emprise
Whicú were ful hard , for any æ is heere
To brynge a boute , but they of hi~ it lere
As homly as he ryt , a monges ©ow
If ©e hi~ knewe , it wolde be for ©oure prow
ñe wolde nat forgon , his acqueyntaunce
For mechel good , I dar leye in balaunce
Al that I haue , in my possessiou~
He is a man , of heigú discresiou~
I warne ©ow wel , he is a passyng man
Wel quod oure hoost , I preye the telle me than
Is he a clerk or noon , telle what he is
Nay , he is grettere than a Clerk , I wys
Seide this ©eman , and in wordes fewe
Hoost of his craft , som what I wol ©ow shewe
I seye my lord can , suche sotiltee
But al his craft , ©e moun nat wyte of me
And som what helpe I ©et , to his werkyng
That al this g¼unde , on whicú we ben ridyng
Til that we come , to Caunterbury Toun
He coude al clene , turnen vp so doun
And paue it al of siluer , and of golde
And whan this ©eman , had this tale I tolde
Vn to oure hoost , he seide benedicite
This thyng , is wonder mäueillous , to me
Syn æ thy lord , is , of so heigú prudence
By cause of whicú , men shulde hi~ reuerence
That of his worship~ , rekketú he so lite
His ouä sloppe , nys nougút wortú a myte
As in effect , to hi~ , so mot I go
It is al baudy , and tore also
Why is thy lord so sluttissú , I the preye
And is of power , bettre clotú to beye
If that his dede , a corded witú thy speche
Telle me that , and I the biseche
¢ Why q¶ this ©eman , wher to aske ©e me

note.notetxt: 87Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: God helpe me so , for he shal neuäe the
But I wol nat a vowe , that I seye
And æäfore kepe it secree , I ©ow preye
He is to wys in feitú , as I bileue
That æat is ouer doon , It wol nat preue
A rigút , as Clerkes seyn , it is a vice
